priorityRows.concept: Human-created traces can enter training data; rights questions remain human and institutional.
priorityRows.issue: Social/provenance idea can feel too chart-like if overdiagrammed.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Left learner UI unchanged and created a production Image 2 prompt with HTML callouts.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Needs a future textless PNG before replacing the coded scene.
priorityRows.nextRecommendation: Generate Image 2 asset in a dedicated asset pass.

priorityRows.concept: Benefits can be useful while still bounded by evidence, context, safeguards, and review.
priorityRows.issue: Tier concept is more judgment landscape than exact mechanism.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Left learner UI unchanged and created a production Image 2 prompt with outside callouts.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Future PNG must avoid hype, miracle imagery, and baked-in labels.
priorityRows.nextRecommendation: Generate Image 2 asset after visual tone review.

priorityRows.concept: AI outputs depend on infrastructure, human systems, power, and governance choices.
priorityRows.issue: Invisible costs benefit from atmosphere, but numbers and claims must stay out of the image.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Left learner UI unchanged and created a production Image 2 prompt.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Generated asset must avoid fake statistics and disaster imagery.
priorityRows.nextRecommendation: Generate Image 2 asset with strict negative prompt.

priorityRows.concept: AI can support decisions, but review, governance, dignity, and accountability remain human.
priorityRows.issue: Accountability concept needs warmth without robot judges or moral-halo metaphors.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Left learner UI unchanged and created a production Image 2 prompt.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Future image must stay textless and avoid faces, halos, and automation fantasy.
priorityRows.nextRecommendation: Generate Image 2 asset after the social concept art set is approved.

priorityRows.concept: Fine-tuning can durably adapt behavior; prompts, RAG/context, and sampling steer the current run.
priorityRows.issue: The previous caption emphasized durable adaptation but did not make the neighboring boundaries explicit enough.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Updated caption, subtitle, callouts, key takeaway, accessible description, and print note.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Future coded overlay markers may help if the generated art is reused in a high-stakes review packet.
priorityRows.nextRecommendation: Keep current PNG and improved HTML callouts for v0.27.17.

priorityRows.concept: Attention computes weighted relevance between token positions, not awareness.
priorityRows.issue: A web-like scene can accidentally imply broad awareness or mind-like noticing.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Redrew the diagram around a target token, source tokens, one strong link, one weak link, and a not-awareness note.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: No major concern after mobile QA; keep labels short.

priorityRows.concept: Attention mixes across positions; the MLP reshapes features within one token position.
priorityRows.issue: The visual needed a cleaner contrast between cross-position mixing and same-position reshaping.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Redrew with a compact attention panel, same-position cat token, MLP panel, and before/after feature bars.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Feature bars are still simplified teaching symbols.

priorityRows.concept: Repeated transformer blocks refine temporary hidden states.
priorityRows.issue: The stack needed stronger "repeated block" structure without implying thought steps.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Redrew each layer as Layer N plus attention and MLP chips, with refined output states and temporary-this-run note.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Residual paths and normalization remain in callouts, not the diagram.

priorityRows.concept: Hidden states are temporary context-shaped vectors, distinct from embeddings and durable weights.
priorityRows.issue: Needed a simpler contrast among ID, embedding, hidden states, scores, weights, and memory.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Redrew the flow and added durable weights versus temporary states language inside the diagram.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Still simplified; details stay in the HTML callouts.

priorityRows.concept: Logits are raw next-token scores before probabilities, not confidence or truth.
priorityRows.issue: Needed stronger "raw score" and "not probability/truth" framing.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Adjusted top labels and bottom boundary chip while preserving the candidate-score bars.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Scores are teaching values, not actual model internals.

priorityRows.concept: Softmax turns raw scores into probabilities that sum to one; it does not choose the token.
priorityRows.issue: Previous language risked letting learners merge softmax and sampling.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Updated caption/callouts and diagram note to say softmax is not the chooser.

priorityRows.concept: Sampling chooses one next token from probability-shaped options; fit is not proof.
priorityRows.issue: Needed the truth boundary in callouts, not squeezed into the diagram.
priorityRows.actionTaken: Updated callout/key takeaway and simplified the chosen-token label area.
priorityRows.remainingConcern: Keep temperature/top-k/top-p out of this intro visual.
